summary: Iteration 21 - Full frontend test of new button-based sidebar navigation, Dashboard Altair charts, Container Map default page, and all primary/secondary menu navigation. All features working correctly. CRITICAL BUG from iteration 20 (secondary menu radio navigation broken) is now FIXED - sidebar rewritten to use buttons with st.rerun() pattern.

issues: Chart with single owner (Tavares de Almeida) shows wide green bar filling full chart width with diagonal x-axis label barely visible at bottom right. Minor visual rendering artifact (pre-existing, noted in iteration 20 as Vega-Lite v6 compatibility).

Container labels are numeric characters appearing rotated -30deg. Labels appear as single digits (container codes like '5', '6', '4' etc.) - may indicate container codes are numeric which is expected. Vega-Lite v5/v6 version mismatch console warnings still present (non-breaking).

critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: sidebar navigation now uses buttons with st.rerun() - secondary menu navigation works correctly.
MINOR: Altair v5 spec still generates Vega-Lite v5 spec but installed version is v6. Charts render visually despite version mismatch warnings. Consider upgrading altair package.

MINOR: Container Map iframe HTML component map (contentores boxes) not rendered in screenshots (JS/iframe rendering) - this is expected for Playwright testing. Functional verification shows toolbar KPIs and buttons are working.
seed_data_creation: N/A - pre-existing data (430 straws, 16 active lots, 16 containers)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All navigation is now working. Sidebar uses button-based navigation with st.rerun(). Default page after login is Container Map (secondary menu, 'Mais opções' expander opens automatically). Secondary menu navigation via buttons WORKS (was broken in iter 20). Dashboard KPIs: 430 straws, 16 active lots, 0 inseminations today, 0 critical stock. Altair charts render with minor Vega-Lite version warnings (non-critical).

login.details: Login with admin/admin123 works, button index 3 in DOM

default_page_container_map.details: 'Mapa dos Contentores' header shown after login. KPI bar: 16 Contentores, 430 Palhetas. Buttons: 'Adicionar Contentor', 'Editar Mapa'

dashboard_kpi_cards.details: 430 TOTAL STRAWS, 16 ACTIVE LOTS, 0 INSEMINATIONS TODAY, 0 CRITICAL STOCK - all correct

dashboard_altair_charts.details: Both 'Palhetas por Contentor' (blue bars) and 'Palhetas por Proprietário' (green bar) render. Minor Vega-Lite v5/v6 warnings in console.

dashboard_recent_activity.details: RECENT ACTIVITY table shows transfer (Tavares de Almeida → Andre Costa) and insemination records

dashboard_quick_actions.details: QUICK ACTIONS section with 4 buttons: New Insemination, New Transfer, Import Stock, View Map

primary_menu_dashboard.details: Dashboard button (primary, highlighted red when active) navigates to dashboard

primary_menu_view_stock.details: View Stock button navigates to stock page

primary_menu_reports.details: Reports button navigates to reports page

primary_menu_add_stock.details: Add Stock button navigates away from dashboard

primary_menu_register_insemination.details: Register Insemination button navigates away from dashboard

primary_menu_transfers.details: Int/Ext Transf. button navigates away from dashboard

secondary_menu_container_map.details: Clicking 'Container Map' in 'Mais opções' expander correctly navigates to Mapa dos Contentores page (BUG FIXED from iteration 20)

secondary_menu_settings.details: Settings button in secondary menu navigates to settings page

logout.details: Log out button works, redirects to login page

top_spacing.details: Dashboard header at ~230px from top (includes topbar + custom header bar). CSS padding-top: 0.4rem applied. No excessive whitespace.
